emails.subject: RE: Couple of things
emails.body: RE: Couple of things Yes and Yes To: Kitchen, Louise

emails.subject: RE: Couple of things
emails.body: RE: Couple of things Yes cancel Power origination Yes cancel them going forward John doesn't need them either at the moment To: Kitchen, Louise

emails.subject: Couple of things
emails.body: Couple of things Laura Luce wants to meet with you today-can you give me a time that would be good for you? Jean Mrha wants to know if her meeting with you tomorrow will be cancelled? Tammy Shepperd wants to know if you would still like to keep your office here after we move for a few weeks? Tammie Schoppe Enron Americas-Office of the Chair Assistant to Louise Kitchen 713.853.4220 office 713.646.8562 fax 713.253.2131 mobile

emails.subject: Couple of things
emails.body: Couple of things Did you ever receive a refund check from ADT Security? Expenses: They have informed me your $5,000 payment was issued on 1/4/01 and it takes 10 business days to arrive. It was mailed here so I will keep an eye out for it. They also said all of you expense reports have been processed but they can not pay the remaining balances until they get approval from Enron. I will keep on top of it. Have you heard anything else about us getting paid our remaining balances? Tammie Schoppe Enron Americas-Office of the Chair Assistant to Louise Kitchen 713.853.4220 office 713.646.8562 fax 713.253.2131 mobile

emails.subject: RE: Couple of things
emails.body: RE: Couple of things No No To: Kitchen, Louise

emails.subject: Couple of things
emails.body: Couple of things Is it okay if I get Jesse(our clerk) to pack your files? I want to confirm what you wanted packed. All files except your EOL files. Does this mean all binders in bookcases as well in your cabinets? Is it okay to tell people that are calling for you that you are in London? I told Pat O'Donnell you were in London but reachable. Also, do you want someone to sit in for me while I'm out? I talked to Liz and she thought she would be fine but I wanted to check with you. Tammie Schoppe Enron Americas-Office of the Chair Assistant to Louise Kitchen 713.853.4220 office 713.646.8562 fax 713.253.2131 mobile

emails.subject: RE: Couple of things
emails.body: RE: Couple of things Really you need to do it. Pack everything apart from the ESVL files and SEC subpeona stuff. Pack on ly what is in the hanging files in the cupboards and my drawers. Anything outside of a hanging file leave for later. I would prefer you to do it as it needs indexing. STuff in my office hanging files goes to Don Miller and the rest goes to (ask legal). Leave binders,etc for now. Did you get rid of the deal momentoes (4 boxes). Tell them they can get me on my mobiles no problem. Liz can cover have a great time. Pick up your tickets early in the day.

emails.subject: Couple of things
emails.body: Couple of things Kevin Presto wants to know if it's okay to take the office next to John's-06102? I received a call from a Candice Karpakis with Williams Company and she wanted a list of our trading group. She has done business with Enron for 15 years and has worked closely with Steve South on transportation on the Northwestern pipelines. She would like the list so she knows who she should contact to do business. I told her I would need to get approval before I could send anything. What are your thoughts on this? I did an expense report for you but it's only $314 so I thought I would wait and see if you had any additional expense I could add. I packed your files and sent them to Don Miller. I put a list of the files that were sent on your wall behind your monitor. I will have my cell phone with me so please do not hesitate to call me. Tammie Schoppe Enron Americas-Office of the Chair Assistant to Louise Kitchen 713.853.4220 office 713.646.8562 fax 713.253.2131 mobile
